M6.detail: LL-010: FastAPI int Query() param ?offset=1 arrived as str '1' in cross-arch sandbox; list slice raised TypeError. Fixed with explicit int() cast in list_feeds().

M9.detail: LL-013: TestQueuesContentionEndpointIntegration still tested deprecated GET /queues/contention (M4 aggregate shape). M7 changed this to GET /queues/{queue_class}/contention. Unit tests were fixed (ISS-018) but integration tests were not updated. Fixed by rewriting 4 integration tests to use the M7 per-class API. Lesson: grep all test files for old endpoint URLs before closing a milestone.

M7.detail: LL-012: Optional[SamplingMethod] field in EquityChartResponse raised 'TypeError: typing.Optional[...SamplingMethod] is not a generic class' in cross-arch pydantic-core stub when sampling_method=SamplingMethod.LTTB (non-None). Fixed with model_construct() bypass in _build_equity_response().
